description: Ship the two-mode (Write + Study) MVP for nursing students

stories.title: Supabase auth + per-user RLS baseline
stories.description: Stand up Supabase auth and lock every table behind row-level security so each student only ever sees their own notes.
stories.goal: Guarantee per-user data isolation before any feature touches notes.
stories.notes: RLS must precede every data feature, so this is the foundational story.
tasks: Enable Supabase email auth and the JWT session flow
Add RLS policies scoping notes and users to auth.uid()
acceptance_criteria: An authenticated user can read and write only their own rows
A signed-out request to any table is rejected

stories.title: Tiptap Write Mode editor shell
stories.description: Build the minimal Write Mode ("Lecture") editor on Tiptap with 30s autosave so students can capture notes fast.
stories.goal: Give students a fast, low-friction capture surface for live lectures.
tasks: Mount the Tiptap editor in the authenticated note route
Wire 30s debounced autosave to the notes table
acceptance_criteria: Typing in the editor persists to the note within 30 seconds
Reloading the note restores the last saved content

stories.title: Local-first autocomplete from the nursing-term DB
stories.description: Serve instant word completion from the local 5,000+ term dictionary as the primary, instant path for Write Mode.
stories.goal: Deliver sub-100ms word completion with no API call as the primary path.
tasks: Index the local nursing-term dictionary for prefix lookup
Surface completions as Tab-acceptable ghost text in the editor
acceptance_criteria: A typed prefix returns a completion in under 100ms with no network call
Tab accepts the completion and continuing to type dismisses it

stories.title: Study Mode key-term spotting
stories.description: Run GPT-4o-mini Structured Outputs over the note to surface a typed key-term list with emphasis cues in the Study Tools panel.
stories.goal: Spot exam-relevant key terms so students know what to focus on.
stories.notes: Runs only in Study Mode; budget is under 5s per 3,000 words.
tasks: Add an Edge Function that calls GPT-4o-mini with a Structured Outputs schema
Render the returned typed term list with emphasis cues in the Study Tools panel
acceptance_criteria: Switching to Study Mode populates the key-term list within 5s for a 3,000-word note
Each spotted term carries its emphasis cue

stories.title: Spike: ghost-text latency budget
stories.description: Measure GPT ghost-text round-trip latency to confirm the 500ms suppress threshold is achievable before committing to phrase prediction.
stories.goal: De-risk the AI ghost-text feature by proving the latency budget up front.
stories.notes: Time-boxed investigation; output is a go/no-go recommendation, not shipped code.
tasks: Instrument round-trip latency for GPT-4.1 nano phrase prediction
Record p50/p95 latencies against the 500ms suppress threshold
acceptance_criteria: A latency report records p50 and p95 against the 500ms threshold
The spike ends with a documented go/no-go on AI ghost text
